unhostedWallets.notes: Travel rule transmission obligation does not apply to transfers to/from unhosted wallets (no counterparty VASP to transmit to). However, VASPs must collect and retain counterparty information (name, blockchain address) for record-keeping even when no transmission is required.

rules.notes: Full enforcement since June 1, 2023 under APTCP amendment. All VASP-to-VASP transfers require originator/beneficiary data regardless of amount. Transitional period (April 2022 - May 2023) had JPY 100,000 threshold and was limited to BTC/ETH. Address is one option; customer identification number is an alternative.
